solution: 
class Solution:
    def licenseKeyFormatting(self, s: str, k: int) -> str:
        chars = [c.upper() for c in s if c != '-']
        n = len(chars)
        if n == 0:
            return ""
        first_len = n % k or k
        parts = [''.join(chars[:first_len])]
        for i in range(first_len, n, k):
            parts.append(''.join(chars[i:i+k]))
        return '-'.join(parts)
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(n)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Strip dashes, uppercase letters, then build groups from right to left; first group length is n mod k (or k if zero). Join with dashes.
